title: Track comments matching a regular expression
description: Track comments matching a regular expressionAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?This rule template can be used to create rules which will be triggered when a comment matches a given regular expression.For example, one can create a rule with the regular expression.*REVIEW.*to match all comment containing "REVIEW".Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
